docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLORES, ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, RENE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
